title: Array Append
description: Store and manage an ordered list of items using Swift's native Array type and the append method.
problemStatement:
Shopping list! Create a mutable array of strings named `shoppingList` containing `"Milk"` and `"Eggs"`. Append the value `"Bread"` to the end of the array.

**Requirement:** Use the `.append()` method.
hints: Arrays in Swift must hold elements of the same type.
